items.title: Hollander POTD Penny Hardaway. Explosive Memphis guard was drafted 3rd by ORL via trade w/GS. Became all-star bookend to Shaq. Carried team in 95 when Shaq was hurt. Sadly, knees went & wasn't same player by 98. Lasted til 09. Per bio he's "so damn good it makes you sick."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
